name: Spectrum Care Malt Paste For Kitten 30g
description: Supports the skeletal and muscular system, immune system, skin and coat development and mental health of developing kittens. Helps lactating cats regain lost vitamins and minerals. Supports the intestinal and digestive systems with prebiotic nutrients. Key Benefits: Helps reduce plaque and tartar buildup. Provides a fresh malt flavor that cats enjoy. Promotes healthy teeth and gums. Non-toxic and safe for regular use. Ideal for maintaining good oral hygiene in cats. Inactive Ingredient Malt Extract (1.1.18) 52.5%, Oat Flour (1.4.9), Vegetable oil and fat (2.20.1), Yeast Products (12.1.12), Potassium Sorbate (E202), Deionized Water. Contains mannanoligosaccharide MOS and Beta Glucan. Nutrient Components Protein 5,7% Fat Content 22,3% Crude Fiber 0,76% Crude Ash 2,4% Moisture 16% Nutritional Recommendations and Warning Refer to the table for recommended daily amount of food (grams/day) that vary according to your cat’s age (months). The recommended daily amount of food may vary depending on the outdoor temperature, your cat’s living conditions (indoor/outdoor), character and activity In order for your cat to have/maintain the ideal weight, the amount of food to be given should be weighed. When adjusting the amount of food to be given, your cat’s appetite, appearance and stool analysis should be considered. Switching to a different food should be done gradually, by mixing small amounts of both (old and new) foods over the course of a week. Always keep clean and fresh water near the food bowl. Even if the water looks clean, change it at least once a day. Store the product in a dry and cool place and make sure that the package is well closed after each use. The recommended consumption date, batch code and factory approval number are on the package.
